feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to show description order in print out
entry.content:
hi expert,

in iw32 there are description order, how to show description order in print out, this case is configuration or modification program? 

thank u

#plant maintennce #order #iw32

entry.title: how to show tab revision in notification
entry.content:
hi expert

i have requirement to show field revision and tab revision in notification bellow tab reference object?how can i get it? i try in spro screen notification it's not work ? there is another step? 

 

thank u

entry.title: Increase the useful life of an asset with a new depreciation key interval
entry.content:
Hi All,

Lets say, there is an asset with value 10,000 EUR with a scrap value of 1000, EUR and Useful life of 5 years (Straight line). In the 5th year, when the asset gets to its scrap value of 1000 EUR, we want to extend the Useful life of the asset by lets say 2 years and then depreciate it fully per straight line (500 EUR per year) . Can we achieve this by adding a new interval ? I added a new interval but it doesnt extend the useful life of the asset and depreciates fully in 5th year

Kind regards

Gitank

entry.title: inventory listing by SKU for Company Code
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

Please let me know how to obtain the inventory listing by SKU for Company Code 1390 for profit center 273346? User likes to know how much is the collateral balance vs saleable inventory.


Please suggest.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Assign different functional locations at tasklist level
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I have this requirements: 

the client wants to create a work order from a maintenance plan, that will have different functional locations defined for each operations. So the request is the possibility to define, for each operation inside a tasklist, a specific functional location/equipment.

I know that there is the possibility to assign a functional location for each operation from the "object list" inside the work order, but the request is to define different FLs for each operations inside the tasklist...because then, they wants to create this kind of WO from a maintenance plan (tied to that particular tasklist).

Thank you so much,

entry.title: Impact conversion ECC to S/4HANA in SAP Plant Maintenance (PM)
entry.content:
Hi,

A client that wants to convert from ECC to S/4HANA, what impacts does this have on the Plant Maintenance (PM) module?
This in a Brownfiled conversion.


Are there tables that change?
Are there transactions that will be obsolete?

Best Regards,

Daniel

entry.title: Catalogs used in Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can you please let us know other than the standard 5 catalogs what are the catalogs used for Notifications in Plant Maintenance?

Regards,

Preeti

entry.title: Cancel Call Object in the Maintenance Plan with No Shift
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have an issue with scheduling plan dates for call objects in the Maintenance Plan. The call object is notification, Shift factor is 100% and the Completion Requirement is ticked. In this scenario, the notification is a routine alarm.

The routine may not be performed on the planned date. In this case, the notification needs to be closed (Canceled), but the planned date of the next call object should not change (not shift). Is there a standard solution for this?

Regards

entry.title: Auto print released work orders
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Can you please let us know on how to auto print the released work orders to respective storage locations. 

Regards, 

Preethi

entry.title: Hello all Could someone share with me a configuration guide for PM-WCM component.
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I'm actually working on activation the PM-WCM component and I'm facing some problems in the configuration.

Could anyone share with me a configuration guide?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Hidden Fields in SAP PM Notification
entry.content:
Hi experts,
We Hide 2 fields in PM notification and the "/" between them is still existed.
I want to hide the sign as well.

Additionally, I have hidden some fields and now I want to change the layout and move the field in the picture beside the priority.

I would be thankful if someone could help me to solve these issues.

Best regards

entry.title: how to use material valuation type C1 in work order iw32
entry.content:
hello,

I have two materials with the same number but one has an empty valuation type with price A and the other has a valuation type C1 with price B, I input the material in iw32 but the price recorded from material valuation type empty.

What should I do, so i can input material in iw32 that get  price from material valuation C1

Thank You

entry.title: Creating a person responsible in S/4HANA to assign in maintenance Order in IW32
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created maintenance order in S/4HANA IDES system and want to assign person responsible in the order and I am not able to get any person responsible in the list. How to create person responsible so that it appears in the list and I can assign. 

Thanks and Regards

KVKUMAR

entry.title: I am facing issue for equipment plant transfer scenario
entry.content:
One Super Equipment is having four Sub equipment. One user changed the maintenance Plant, Maintenance Planning plant and Cost center accordingly. After change, Maintenance plant of all subordinate equipment found changed but two equipment Maintenance planning plant and cost center found unchanged . These two has to be centrally changed as other two equipment.

Any one pl help me to check which config setting for that issue.

entry.title: Stop creation of maintenance work order
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement to stop create the work orders to all the equipments under a functional location.

There are 03 things we can inactivate, inactivate equipment, inactive functional location, inactive maintenance plans related to those equipments.

What is the better approach to stop the creation of maintenance work orders for this scenario.

Should I go on inactivate individual maintenance plans, should I go on inactivate each equipment under that functional location or should I just inactive the functional location?

entry.title: Usage and differences between MRS , RSH and FSM
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are working on a requirement for  Resource Scheduling for one of our client.

SAP has 3 products available i.e. MRS , FSM and RSH.

Can someone tell me what are the usages of those and the differences between them? 

Thanks and Regards,

S Kumar

entry.title: Maintenance Order Complete window not showing Completion Date fields
entry.content:
Hi,

While doing TECO against a Maintenance Order created automatically from a Plan, the Completion Date and Time fields are not appearing on top right as shown below:

When I access my other system, it shows as follows:

What configurations am i missing in the other system since these fields are standard fields and in both cases Orders generated directly from Maintenance Plans.

Thanking in advance

BR

entry.title: Does integration exist between SAP CRM and SAP ERP (ECC6 EHP8) Plant Maintenance?
entry.content:
Hi experts

Is there any SAP standard integration from SAP CRM service requests to SAP ERP PM work orders?

If so, where is the configuration found?

entry.title: Ways to enhance IH01
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to add additional fields in IH01. I want to add object link field in IH01 and IH03.

Thanks & Regards,

Preethi Alevarthi.

entry.title: Object Link in IH01
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please let us know on how to add fields of object link in IH01 Structure and how to activate the menu option for the additional fields in a standard way.

Thanks,

Preethi.
